channel.title: The Cloudflare Blog
channel.description: Get the latest news on how products at Cloudflare are built, technologies used, and join the teams helping to build a better Internet.

item.title: 【Introducing the Agent Readiness score. Is your site agent-ready?】介绍代理准备度分数。您的网站代理准备好了吗？
item.description: 【 The Agent Readiness score can help site owners understand how well their websites support AI agents. Here we explore new standards, share Radar data, and detail how we made Cloudflare’s docs the most agent-friendly on the web. 】代理就绪度分数可以帮助网站所有者了解他们的网站对 AI 代理的支持程度。在这里，我们探索新标准，共享 Radar 数据，并详细介绍我们如何使 Cloudflare 的文档成为网络上对代理最友好的文档。

item.title: 【Shared Dictionaries: compression that keeps up with the agentic web】共享词典：紧跟代理网络的压缩
item.description: 【 Today, we’re excited to give you a sneak peek of our support for shared compression dictionaries, show you how it improves page load times, and reveal when you’ll be able to try the beta yourself. 】今天，我们很高兴让您先睹为快，了解我们对共享压缩字典的支持，向您展示它如何缩短页面加载时间，并透露您何时可以亲自尝试测试版。

item.title: 【Unweight: how we compressed an LLM 22% without sacrificing quality】减轻重量：我们如何在不牺牲质量的情况下将法学硕士课程压缩 22%
item.description: 【 Running LLMs across Cloudflare’s network requires us to be smarter and more efficient about GPU memory bandwidth. That’s why we developed Unweight, a lossless inference-time compression system that achieves up to a 22% model footprint reduction, so that we can deliver faster and cheaper inference than ever before. 】在 Cloudflare 网络上运行 LLM 需要我们在 GPU 内存带宽方面更加智能和高效。这就是我们开发 Unweight 的原因，这是一种无损推理时间压缩系统，可将模型占用空间减少高达 22%，从而使我们能够提供比以往更快、更便宜的推理。

item.title: 【Introducing Flagship: feature flags built for the age of AI】旗舰简介：为人工智能时代打造的功能标志
item.description: 【 We are launching Flagship, a native feature flag service built on Cloudflare’s global network to eliminate the latency of third-party providers. By using KV and Durable Objects, Flagship allows for sub-millisecond flag evaluation. 】我们正在推出 Flagship，这是一项基于 Cloudflare 全球网络构建的本机功能标记服务，旨在消除第三方提供商的延迟。通过使用 KV 和持久对象，Flagship 允许进行亚毫秒级的标志评估。

item.title: 【Redirects for AI Training enforces canonical content】AI 培训重定向强制执行规范内容
item.description: 【 Soft directives don’t stop crawlers from ingesting deprecated content. Redirects for AI Training allows anybody on Cloudflare to redirect verified crawlers to canonical pages with one toggle and no origin changes. 】软指令不会阻止爬虫摄取已弃用的内容。 AI Training 重定向允许 Cloudflare 上的任何人通过一次切换将经过验证的爬虫重定向到规范页面，并且无需更改来源。

item.title: 【Agents that remember: introducing Agent Memory】具有记忆功能的智能体：引入智能体记忆
item.description: 【 Cloudflare Agent Memory is a managed service that gives AI agents persistent memory, allowing them to recall what matters, forget what doesn't, and get smarter over time. 】Cloudflare Agent Memory 是一项托管服务，可为 AI 代理提供持久记忆，使他们能够回忆起重要的事情，忘记不重要的事情，并随着时间的推移变得更加聪明。

item.title: 【Agents Week: network performance update】代理周：网络性能更新
item.description: 【 By migrating our request handling layer to a Rust-based architecture called FL2, Cloudflare has increased its performance lead to 60% of the world’s top networks. We use real-user measurements and connection trimeans to ensure our data reflects the actual experience of people on the Internet. 】通过将我们的请求处理层迁移到基于 Rust 的架构（称为 FL2），Cloudflare 的性能已提高到世界顶级网络的 60%。我们使用真实用户测量和连接三均值来确保我们的数据反映人们在互联网上的实际体验。

item.title: 【Cloudflare’s AI Platform: an inference layer designed for agents】Cloudflare 的 AI 平台：专为代理设计的推理层
item.description: 【 We're building AI Gateway into a unified inference layer for AI, letting developers call models from 14+ providers. New features include Workers AI binding integration and an expanded catalog with multimodal models. 】我们正在将 AI Gateway 构建为 AI 的统一推理层，让开发人员可以调用来自 14 个以上提供商的模型。新功能包括 Workers AI 绑定集成和具有多模式模型的扩展目录。

item.title: 【Building the foundation for running extra-large language models】为运行超大型语言模型奠定基础
item.description: 【 We built a custom technology stack to run fast large language models on Cloudflare’s infrastructure. This post explores the engineering trade-offs and technical optimizations required to make high-performance AI inference accessible. 】我们构建了一个自定义技术堆栈，以便在 Cloudflare 基础设施上快速运行大型语言模型。这篇文章探讨了实现高性能人工智能推理所需的工程权衡和技术优化。

item.title: 【Artifacts: versioned storage that speaks Git】Artifacts：使用 Git 的版本化存储
item.description: 【 Give your agents, developers, and automations a home for code and data. We’ve just launched Artifacts: Git-compatible versioned storage built for agents. Create tens of millions of repos, fork from any remote, and hand off a URL to any Git client. 】为您的代理、开发人员和自动化提供代码和数据的家。我们刚刚推出了 Artifacts：为代理构建的与 Git 兼容的版本化存储。创建数千万个存储库，从任何远程分支，并将 URL 传递给任何 Git 客户端。
